chapter_title: Permits for Oversize or Overweight Vehicles
text: A permit under this subchapter is void on the failure of an owner or the owner’s representative to comply with a rule of the board or with a condition placed on the permit, and immediately on the violation, further movement over a highway of an oversize or overweight vehicle violates the law regulating the size or weight of a vehicle on a public highway.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 623. Permits for Oversize or Overweight Vehicles
##### § 623.196 — Violation of Rule

A permit under this subchapter is void on the failure of an owner or the owner’s representative to comply with a rule of the board or with a condition placed on the permit, and immediately on the violation, further movement over a highway of an oversize or overweight vehicle violates the law regulating the size or weight of a vehicle on a public highway.

*Acts 2011, 82nd Leg., R.S., Ch. 1345 (S.B.1420), Sec. 89, eff. September 1, 2011.*
